description: Bundle scan: komisionářská smlouva + AML/FATCA + dotazník. Text layer exists but is OCR garbage on ≥2 pages. Primary scan anchor for vision-primary path and AML/FATCA annex split.
notes: Do NOT block publish assertions here yet — Wave 1.3 is permissive-mode only; hard-block publish policy is defined by `vision-fallback-gate.ts` but not enforced in W1.3.
If the primary path eventually learns to read this scan without the rescue tier, lower `maxRecoveredFromImageRatio` instead of deleting the anchor.
